name: Receipt
description: Point-of-sale and digital receipts — merchant, items, totals, payment.
instructions:
Extract the following fields:

- merchant_name (string)
- merchant_address (string)
- receipt_date (date)
- receipt_time (string)
- payment_method (string)
- card_last_four (string)
- subtotal (number)
- tax_amount (number)
- total_amount (number)
- items (array): each item has description, quantity, unit_price

Mark fields not present in the document as null.
